name: Basil-Coconut Curry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Minced fresh lemon grass or 2 teaspoons grated lemon peel
1 tablespoon Dried kaffir lime leaves or chopped fresh lemon leaves
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 to 2 quart pan, bring white wine, minced ginger, lemon grass (or lemon peel), and dried kaffir lime leaves to a boil over high heat. Add red curry paste and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
2. Whirl the mixture with cornstarch and coconut milk in a blender until smooth. Return to the pan. If using fresh basil, stir over high heat until boiling. If making ahead, chill airtight up to 1 day. Reheat and simmer; if needed, add coconut milk to thin. Stir in fresh basil leaves before serving. Use hot.
